rationale: All brief elements are present and correct: bold white 'Dr. Maya Chen', muted gray 'CLIMATE SCIENTIST, NOAA', a #00C2A8 vertical accent bar, lower-left placement near 120px/y~940, empty frames at 0% and 100% matching the hold and clean exit. The filmstrip shows the prescribed choreography: empty first tile, accent bar leading alone in tile 2, full text by tile 3, steady hold through tile 9, and a partially faded graphic in the final tile consistent with the 4.2-5.0s exit. Typography is tight with clear hierarchy (bold name over letterspaced uppercase role) and reads broadcast-ready. Motion gets a 4 only because the staggered per-element entry resolves across just two tiles, so the ease quality and left-slide are hard to fully verify, though nothing teleports or freezes incorrectly.
